name: Hydrogen Peroxide Whitening Rinse
description: A diluted peroxide rinse using the same active chemistry as commercial whitening strips and rinses at a fraction of the cost — gradual oxidative whitening plus oral disinfection.
shelfLife: Use 3% H₂O₂ within 6 months of opening; dilute fresh
effectivenessNote: Same active ingredient as commercial whitening products. Gradual results over weeks. Lower concentration than strips so slower whitening, but also less sensitivity.
warnings: Keep H₂O₂ in opaque bottle — light degrades it
scienceNote: Hydrogen peroxide oxidizes chromophore molecules bound to tooth enamel, breaking their conjugated double-bond systems and rendering stains colorless. Same mechanism as commercial whitening at lower concentration.
